response: The serum and FF levels of 25OH-VD, and FF levels of TNF-α, 25OH-VD, and TAC were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions and were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech. MR 7000). - Human serum 25-OHVD level was measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Manufacturer Inc., City, Country) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). - Human serum TNF-α level was measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Manufacturer Inc., City, Country) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (17). - Human serum TAC level was measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Manufacturer Inc., City, Country) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (18).
